lot_no: & Slope protection of embankment and riverbank protective work at Fuljhuri Launch Ghat under Polder 41/6B from Km 17.800 to Km 18.100 Total 0.300 Km in connection with "Rehabilitation of Polder 41/6A, 41/6B & 41/7A and protection of vulnerable portion including Betagi town from the erosion of Bishkhali & Payra river under Barguna district." under Barguna O&M Division, BWDB, Barguna.
